Wednesday, March 25, 2026

Our Story

Counting Down to Forever

♡ Our special day is almost here ♡

PROGRAM

Welcome Photos & Cocktails

Open Bar & Dancing

RECEPTION

Reception Venue

Our reception will take place in The Sunroom at Rizal Gardens — an open-air garden space. The celebration will be outdoors, so expect fresh air, soft grass, and lots of golden hour glow.

Dress Code

Garden party chic! Flowy, breathable fabrics and comfortable shoes (heels are optional, sinking in the grass is not required). Pastel colors are preferred but not mandatory!

Parking & Directions

Free parking is available on-site, with designated areas for PWDs and senior guests. If you need special assistance or a drop-off closer to the garden entrance, let us know.

WHAT TO EXPECT

🎶 Live Music & Dancing

A live band will bring energy to the night — so don’t forget your dancing shoes!

📸 Photo Booth Fun

Strike a pose, grab a prop, and take home a snapshot of the celebration.

🍸 Open Bar

Signature cocktails, fine spirits, and plenty of cheers.

☎ Wedding Phonebook

Pick up the phone and leave us a message we can replay for years to come.

🎉 Interactive Moments

Games, surprises, and shared laughter throughout the evening.

CAPTURE THE NIGHT

We’ve created a special POV disposable film camera experience just for our wedding. Scan the QR code to capture candid moments from your perspective — the laughter, the dancing, the little details we might miss. Every photo becomes part of our story. 📷 Scan. Snap. Share the love.

RESHOOT GALLERY

A few moments from our pre-shoot — tap any photo to view.

PLEASE RSVP

We can’t wait to celebrate with you. Please confirm your attendance by submitting your name and number of guests.
